methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_architecture
documentation:
Attribute Architecture: The image architecture.

Valid values:

- **i386**
- **x86_64**

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_compute_type
documentation:
Attribute ComputeType: Computing type.

ens_vm/ens: x86 computing. bare_metal: x86 bare machine or x86 bare metal. arm_vm: ARM computing. arm_bare_metal: ARM bare machine or ARM bare metal. pcfarm: heterogeneous computing.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_create_time
documentation:
Attribute CreateTime: The image creation time.

The time follows the ISO 8601 standard in the yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format. The time is displayed in UTC.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_image_id
documentation: Attribute ImageId: The ID of the image.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_image_name
documentation: Attribute ImageName: The name of the image.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_image_owner_alias
documentation:
Attribute ImageOwnerAlias: The source of the image.

Valid values:

- **others**: a custom image that is shared by other Alibaba Cloud accounts.
- **self**: your own custom image.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_image_size
documentation:
Attribute ImageSize: The size of the image.

Unit: GiB.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_instance_id
documentation: Attribute InstanceId: The ID of the instance corresponding to the image.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_os_version
documentation: Attribute OsVersion: The operating system version.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_platform
documentation:
Attribute Platform: The type of operating system used by the image.

Valid values:

- **centos**
- **ubuntu**
- **alios**
- **debian**
- **rhel**
- **windows**

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Image.attr_snapshot_id
documentation: Attribute SnapshotId: The ID of the snapshot corresponding to the image.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::ENS::Image`.

documentation:

Fuzzy search is supported.

  Default is Never.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_ens_region_id
documentation:
Attribute EnsRegionId: The node ID.

When ScheduleAreaLevel is Region, EnsRegionId is required. When ScheduleAreaLevel is Big,Middle,Small, EnsRegionId is invalid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_host_name
documentation: Attribute HostName: The hostname of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_image_id
documentation: Attribute ImageId: The ID of the image.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_instance_id
documentation: Attribute InstanceId: The ID of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_instance_name
documentation:
Attribute InstanceName: The instance name.

Example value: test-InstanceName. It must be 2 to 128 characters in length and must start with an uppercase or lowercase letter or a Chinese character. It cannot start with http:// or https. Can contain Chinese, English, numbers, half-width colons (:), underscores (_), periods (.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_instance_type
documentation:
Attribute InstanceType: The specification of the instance.

Example value: ens.sn1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_internet_max_bandwidth_out
documentation:
Attribute InternetMaxBandwidthOut: Maximum public network bandwidth.

The field type is Long, and the precision may be lost during serialization/deserialization.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_network_id
documentation: Attribute NetworkId: The ID of the network.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_payment_type
documentation: Attribute PaymentType: Instance payment method.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_private_ip_address
documentation:
Attribute PrivateIpAddress: The private IP address.

Can only be used for node-level scheduling. If a private IP address is specified, the number of instances can only be one, and both the private IP address and the vSwitch ID are not empty, the private IP address takes effect.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_security_id
documentation: Attribute SecurityId: ID of the security group to which the instance belongs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_system_disk
documentation:
Attribute SystemDisk: System Disk Specification.

SystemDisk is a non-required parameter when InstanceType is x86_pm,x86_bmi,x86_bm,pc_bmi, or arm_bmi. SystemDisk is a required parameter when instanceType is other specification families.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.datasource.Instance.attr_v_switch_id
documentation: Attribute VSwitchId: The ID of the vSwitch to which the instance belongs.

param disk_id

Property diskId: The ID of the cloud disk to be mounted. The Cloud Disk (DiskId) and the instance (InstanceId) must be on the same node.

param instance_id

Property instanceId: Instance ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.DiskProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Disk`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-ens-disk>

```
param category

Property category: The category of the disk. Valid values: cloud_efficiency: ultra disk. cloud_ssd: all-flash disk.

param ens_region_id

Property ensRegionId: The ID of the edge node.

param instance_charge_type

Property instanceChargeType: The billing method of the instance. Set the value to PostPaid.

param size

Property size: The size of the disk. Unit: GiB.

param disk_name

Property diskName: The name of the disk.

param encrypted

Property encrypted: Specifies whether to encrypt the new system disk. Valid values: true false (default): no

param kms_key_id

Property kmsKeyId: The ID of the Key Management Service (KMS) key that is used by the cloud disk. Note If you set the Encrypted parameter to true, the default service key is used when the KMSKeyId parameter is empty.

param snapshot_id

Property snapshotId: The ID of the snapshot that you want to use to create the disk. The following limits apply to the SnapshotId and Size parameters: If the size of the snapshot specified by SnapshotId is greater than the specified Size value, the size of the created disk is equal to the specified snapshot size. If the size of the snapshot specified by SnapshotId is smaller than the specified Size value, the size of the created disk is equal to the specified Size value.
```

Set the value to PostPaid.

Unit: GiB.

Property encrypted: Specifies whether to encrypt the new system disk.

Valid values:
true
false (default): no

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.DiskProps.kms_key_id
documentation:
Property kmsKeyId: The ID of the Key Management Service (KMS) key that is used by the cloud disk.

Note If you set the Encrypted parameter to true, the default service key is used when the KMSKeyId parameter is empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.DiskProps.snapshot_id
documentation:
Property snapshotId: The ID of the snapshot that you want to use to create the disk.

The following limits apply to the SnapshotId and Size parameters:
If the size of the snapshot specified by SnapshotId is greater than the specified Size value, the size of the created disk is equal to the specified snapshot size.
If the size of the snapshot specified by SnapshotId is smaller than the specified Size value, the size of the created disk is equal to the specified Size value.

The description must be 2 to 256 characters in length. It must start with a letter but cannot start with http:// or https://.

methods.name: ros_cdk_ens.VSwitchProps.v_switch_name
documentation:
Property vSwitchName: The name of the vSwitch.

The name must meet the following requirements:
The name must be 2 to 128 characters in length.
The name must start with a letter and cannot start with http:// or https://. It can contain letters, digits, colons (:), underscores (_), and hyphens (-).
Default value: null.
